message:
fix(download): add runtime validation for unverified bake-off manifests

Bake-off model manifests have placeholder checksums and unpinned revisions
("main") which makes them unsuitable for production use. This adds:

- PLACEHOLDER_CHECKSUM constant to identify unverified file checksums
- has_verified_checksums() method to detect placeholder checksums
- has_pinned_revision() method to detect unpinned revisions ("main")
- is_production_ready() method combining both checks
- ManifestNotVerified error variant with detailed failure info
- bakeoff_candidates_ready() and bakeoff_candidates_pending() helpers
- Pre-download validation that rejects unverified manifests gracefully

This prevents users from attempting to download bake-off candidate models
that would fail SHA256 verification, providing a clear error message instead
of a confusing verification failure.

Closes #61

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
